positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric illustration of a stylized celestial body (moon, stars, planets) floating above a stylized crescent forest. The design should feature clean, flowing lines and a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, gold metallic, and muted forest green. Composition must be centered and balanced, optimized for a textile print. Style should be a blend of elegant Art Deco geometry and modern vector art. Lighting should be crisp and even, giving a sense of ethereal glow. Foreground elements should have strong, solid silhouettes against a slightly textured, watercolor-wash background. Intricate details within the geometric elements, suitable for single-color screen printing or direct-to-garment printing.
negative: low detail, blurry, noise, grain, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, messy, distorted, extra limbs, bad anatomy, human, realistic, photorealistic, ugly
